hero.headline:
Win with intelligence,
not instinct.
hero.subheadline: Solon gives presidential campaigns a unified platform for voter simulation, ground coordination, finance compliance, and real-time election-day intelligence.
hero.trust_line: Built for the 2027 cycle · AFP presidential campaign

modules.label: Simulator
modules.headline:
Model every scenario before
a single naira is spent.
modules.description: Run AI-driven presidential election simulations. Stress-test youth turnout, BVAS failure scenarios, coalition shifts, and opponent surges — and see projected outcomes instantly.

modules.label: Voter Intel
modules.headline:
Know your voters before
you reach them.
modules.description: Segment 93M registered voters into behavioural clusters. Generate tailored WhatsApp, SMS, and voice messages per cluster. Map competitiveness by state in seconds.

modules.label: Agents
modules.headline:
Your agent network,
always in view.
modules.description: Track verification status, geographic coverage, and readiness scores for thousands of field agents. Spot gaps before election day and close them.

modules.label: Finance
modules.headline:
Campaign spend that stays
inside the law.
modules.description: Monitor total spend against INEC caps in real time. Track disbursements by category, flag approaching limits, and generate compliance reports ahead of every deadline.

modules.label: War Room
modules.headline:
Command every polling unit
from one screen.
modules.description: Live tally feed, incident tracking, reconciliation alerts, and an AI copilot that answers questions in real time — everything you need on the day that matters most.

features.headline: AI at the core
features.body: Every module is powered by large language models trained on Nigerian electoral data — not generic political science.

features.headline: INEC-aware compliance
features.body: Finance limits, deadlines, and reporting requirements are baked in, not bolted on.

features.headline: Nigeria-first geography
features.body: 36 states, 774 LGAs, 176,000+ polling units — no other platform goes this deep.

features.headline: Real-time everywhere
features.body: From live tally feeds to agent check-ins, the platform streams data as fast as your team reports it.

features.headline: Campaign-grade security
features.body: End-to-end encryption, session isolation, and audit logs on every sensitive action.

features.headline: Unified command
features.body: One platform, five modules, zero tool-switching. Your team sees the same data at the same time.

cta.headline:
Ready to run the smartest
campaign in Nigeria?
cta.body: The demo is live. Explore every module with real 2027 data — no sign-up required.

footer.legal: © 2026 Solon. Built for the AFP presidential campaign. All electoral data is illustrative.
